name: Certification Exam Infrastructure Setup
description:
You are the Testing Infrastructure Manager at the Metropolitan Board of Professional Certification (MBPC). The board is deploying SEB Server to administer high-stakes professional licensing exams. You must set up a complete, production-ready proctored exam environment at http://localhost:8080 (login: super-admin / admin).

Create an exam configuration named "Professional Certification Lockdown" (description: "Hardened browser configuration for high-stakes certification exams"). Its SEB settings must have "Browser View Mode" set to "Use Full Screen Mode" under User Interface and "Allow Uploads" enabled under Down/Upload. Create an exam template named "Proctored Certification Template" (description: "Standard template for proctored certification exams") with two monitoring indicators: a "Last Ping Time" indicator named "Connection Watchdog" (warning threshold: 2500, danger threshold: 8000) and an "Error Log Counter" indicator named "Security Event Monitor" (warning threshold: 3, danger threshold: 10). Create and activate a connection configuration named "Certification Center Link" with password "CertLink2026!" and fallback start URL "https://exams.metroboard.gov/fallback". Create and activate user account "lead.proctor" (first name: Margaret, last name: Chen, email: m.chen@metroboard.gov) with the Exam Supporter role.
